steps.title: Define similar behavior
steps.content: The student's conclusion is that Glory and Squishy behaved similarly in the sound trials. A supporting statement must show those two snakes moving in the same direction in response to the sound.

steps.title: Check the comparisons
steps.content: Choice A compares Dorsal Girl with Glory, not Glory with Squishy. Choice B compares Squishy with Dorsal Girl. Choice C says Squishy and Glory moved in opposite directions. The statement that Glory and Squishy both moved away supports the conclusion. The answer is D.
